inputs.shares_source: FY2025 diluted net income $14.557M / diluted EPS $0.50 (AEHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250728_rpt20250530_acc0001654954_25_008553.htm)
inputs.fcf_source: Mid-cycle operating income proxy $11.726M ÷ 29.215M shares; FY2025 OCF $10.011M per AEHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250728_rpt20250530_acc0001654954_25_008553.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 revenue fell 2% YoY to $65.0M but operating income rose on margin mix; Q3 FY2026 nine-month revenue trough and cash burn signal down-cycle stress.

bear.notes: Semicap down-cycle, SiC order pushouts, inventory write-down risk

base.notes: Mid-cycle burn-in share; SiC wafer-level adoption gradual; exit 8× owner cash

bull.notes: SiC EV and AI power-device burn-in ramp accelerates

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Equipment and inventory at cost; no land-at-zero pattern (10-K)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating test equipment vendor; no royalty reserve pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single operating segment; no material loss division

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue $1.3M small; SiC adoption modeled in sic_wafer_level_option

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No equity-method stakes material to consolidated value

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No litigation recovery or special dividend catalyst

growth_explanation.mechanism: Revenue scales with semiconductor burn-in and wafer-level test system orders, especially silicon carbide power devices for EV and industrial markets.

falsifiers.trigger: Cash falls below $15M while nine-month revenue stays below $50M for two consecutive periods
Inventory stays above $40M for four consecutive quarters without revenue recovery above $70M annualized

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map burn-in test equipment owner cash, SiC wafer-level option, net financial claims, and cycle/inventory reserve once each.

components.label: Burn-in and wafer-level test equipment operations

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AEHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250728_rpt20250530_acc0001654954_25_008553.htm: FY2025 revenue $64.961M, operating income $13.375M, cash $49.159M, inventory $41.997M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q3 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: FY2025 diluted net income $14.557M / diluted EPS $0.50

assumptions.label: Normalized owner cash per diluted share (mid-cycle operating income proxy)
assumptions.rationale: Mid-cycle operating income per share anchors burn-in and wafer-level test equipment economics; FY2025 revenue fell slightly YoY but operating margin expanded.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear stresses semicap down-cycle and customer concentration; base mid-cycle eight-year path; bull modest SiC share gains without peak-cycle heroics.

calculations.label: Burn-in test equipment engine per share

valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q3 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for nine-month revenue trough, inventory build, and cash decline from $49M to $25M not fully embedded in mid-cycle owner-cash multiple.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AEHR, including burn-in equipment owner cash, SiC option, net cash, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 diluted net income $14.557M / diluted EPS $0.50 (AEHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250728_rpt20250530_acc0001654954_25_008553.htm)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims valued once; cash and reserves separate with unique overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q3 FY2026 10-Q extracts; reconciliation 2026-07-21.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: SiC wafer-level burn-in is filed growth focus; base assumes partial adoption over four years. [Assumption]
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: EV and industrial SiC capacity ramps; [Assumption] 4-year base.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental capex for backlog fulfillment embedded in normalized owner cash.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Burn-in and wafer-level test equipment operations
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
